title: [FIRRTL] InjectDUT breaks rwprobes
body:
Example input:
```firrtl
FIRRTL version 5.1.0

circuit RI: %[[
  {
    "class":"sifive.enterprise.firrtl.InjectDUTHierarchyAnnotation",
    "name":"InjectedSubmodule"
  },
  {
    "class":"sifive.enterprise.firrtl.MarkDUTAnnotation",
    "target":"~RI|R"
  }
]]

  public module RI:
    output p : RWProbe<UInt<5>>
    inst r of R
    define p = r.p

  module R:
    output p : RWProbe<UInt<5>>
    wire x : UInt<5>
    define p = rwprobe(x)
```

Produces (`firtool rwprobe_inject_dut.fir -verbose-pass-executions -mlir-print-ir-after-failure`):

```
[firtool] Running fir parser
[firtool] -- Done in 0.004 sec
[firtool] Running "firrtl.circuit(firrtl-check-recursive-instantiation,firrtl-check-layers,firrtl-lower-open-aggs,firrtl-resolve-paths,firrtl-lower-annotations{allow-adding-ports-on-public-modules=false disable-annotation-classless=false disable-annotation-unknown=false no-ref-type-ports=false},firrtl-lower-intmodules{fixup-eicg-wrapper=false},firrtl.module(firrtl-lower-intrinsics),firrtl-specialize-option{select-default-for-unspecified-instance-choice=false},firrtl-lower-signatures,firrtl-inject-dut-hier,any(cse),firrtl.module(firrtl-passive-wires,firrtl-drop-names{preserve-values=none},firrtl-lower-chirrtl,firrtl-lower-matches),firrtl-infer-widths,firrtl-mem-to-reg-of-vec{ignore-read-enable-mem=false repl-seq-mem=false},firrtl-infer-resets,firrtl-drop-const,firrtl-dedup,firrtl.module(firrtl-flatten-memory),firrtl-lower-types{flatten-mem=false preserve-aggregate=none preserve-memories=none},firrtl.module(firrtl-expand-whens,firrtl-sfc-compat),firrtl-check-comb-loops,firrtl-specialize-layers,firrtl-inliner,firrtl.module(firrtl-layer-merge,firrtl-randomize-register-init,canonicalize{  max-iterations=10 max-num-rewrites=-1 region-simplify=disabled test-convergence=false top-down=true},firrtl-infer-rw),firrtl-imconstprop,firrtl-add-seqmem-ports)"
[firtool]   Running "firrtl-check-recursive-instantiation"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.000 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl-check-layers"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.000 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl-lower-open-aggs"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.000 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl-resolve-paths"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.004 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl-lower-annotations{allow-adding-ports-on-public-modules=false disable-annotation-classless=false disable-annotation-unknown=false no-ref-type-ports=false}"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.000 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl-lower-intmodules{fixup-eicg-wrapper=false}"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.000 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl.module(firrtl-lower-intrinsics)"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.000 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl-specialize-option{select-default-for-unspecified-instance-choice=false}"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.000 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl-lower-signatures"
[firtool]   -- Done in 0.000 sec
[firtool]   Running "firrtl-inject-dut-hier"
rwprobe_inject_dut.fir:22:16: error: 'firrtl.ref.rwprobe' op has non-local target
    define p = rwprobe(x)
               ^
rwprobe_inject_dut.fir:22:16: note: see current operation: %1 = "firrtl.ref.rwprobe"() <{target = #hw.innerNameRef<@R::@sym>}> : () -> !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>
// -----// IR Dump After InjectDUTHierarchy Failed (firrtl-inject-dut-hier) //----- //
"firrtl.circuit"() <{annotations = [], name = "RI"}> ({
  "firrtl.module"() <{annotations = [], convention = #firrtl<convention scalarized>, layers = [], portAnnotations = [[]], portDirections = array<i1: true>, portLocations = [loc("rwprobe_inject_dut.fir":15:12)], portNames = ["p"], portSymbols = [], portTypes = [!firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>], sym_name = "RI"}> ({
  ^bb0(%arg2: !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>):
    %3 = "firrtl.instance"() <{annotations = [], layers = [], moduleName = @R, name = "r", nameKind = #firrtl<name_kind interesting_name>, portAnnotations = [[]], portDirections = array<i1: true>, portNames = ["p"]}> : () -> !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>
    "firrtl.ref.define"(%arg2, %3) : (!firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>, !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>) -> ()
  }) : () -> ()
  "firrtl.module"() <{annotations = [], convention = #firrtl<convention internal>, layers = [], portAnnotations = [[]], portDirections = array<i1: true>, portLocations = [loc("rwprobe_inject_dut.fir":20:12)], portNames = ["p"], portSymbols = [], portTypes = [!firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>], sym_name = "InjectedSubmodule"}> ({
  ^bb0(%arg1: !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>):
    %1 = "firrtl.wire"() <{annotations = [], inner_sym = #hw<innerSym@sym>, name = "x", nameKind = #firrtl<name_kind interesting_name>}> : () -> !firrtl.uint<5>
    %2 = "firrtl.ref.rwprobe"() <{target = #hw.innerNameRef<@R::@sym>}> : () -> !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>
    "firrtl.ref.define"(%arg1, %2) : (!firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>, !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>) -> ()
  }) : () -> ()
  "firrtl.module"() <{annotations = [{class = "sifive.enterprise.firrtl.MarkDUTAnnotation"}], convention = #firrtl<convention internal>, layers = [], portAnnotations = [[]], portDirections = array<i1: true>, portLocations = [loc("rwprobe_inject_dut.fir":20:12)], portNames = ["p"], portSymbols = [], portTypes = [!firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>], sym_name = "R"}> ({
  ^bb0(%arg0: !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>):
    %0 = "firrtl.instance"() <{annotations = [], inner_sym = #hw<innerSym@InjectedSubmodule>, layers = [], moduleName = @InjectedSubmodule, name = "InjectedSubmodule", nameKind = #firrtl<name_kind droppable_name>, portAnnotations = [[]], portDirections = array<i1: true>, portNames = ["p"]}> : () -> !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>
    "firrtl.ref.define"(%arg0, %0) : (!firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>, !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<5>>) -> ()
  }) : () -> ()
}) : () -> ()
```
